Allow: /
Allow: /blog
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /pentest-lab
Allow: /gallery

Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /book-session
Disallow: /become-mentor
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Google
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin

# Bing
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin

# Crawl delay for others
User-agent: *
Crawl-delay: 10

Sitemap: https://cyberhx.com/sitemap.xml
